## Description

Describe the changes made in this PR.

## Type of Change

Select the relevant type of change:

- [ ] Bug fix (change that fixes a bug without changing functionality)
- [ ] New feature (change that adds new functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (change that will cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have followed the project's code style
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass (`bun test` or `npm test`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have ensured there are no breaking changes (or have documented them)
- [ ] I have checked security implications of these changes

## Testing

Describe how these changes have been tested:

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Testing on the following browsers/devices: [specify]

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots if these changes affect the UI.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Additional Information

Add any other relevant information for reviewers.
